info.title: SlashMyBill NetworkServerless Actions
info.description: Vendor-neutral action group for network, serverless, and container resource discovery across all supported cloud providers

post.description: Lists network resources including NAT gateways, VPC endpoints, elastic IPs, load balancers, and other networking components for the connected account

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Network resources response with provider-neutral resource listing

post.description: Lists serverless functions with runtime, memory, invocation count, and error metrics for the connected account

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Serverless functions response with provider-neutral function listing

post.description: Lists container orchestration clusters with node count, status, and resource utilization for the connected account

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Container clusters response with provider-neutral cluster listing
